nodes.name: ETLC entrance
nodes.instruction: You're at the ETLC entrance. Walk straight down the main hallway.

nodes.name: First junction
nodes.instruction: Turn right here. Continue toward the exit.

nodes.name: Building exit
nodes.instruction: You're at the exit. Cross to the bus stop ahead.

nodes.name: Bus stop
nodes.instruction: You've arrived at the bus stop.
